info.name: Packrat API
info.description:
REST API for Packrat inventory (`packrat_api`). Set `base_url` if you use another host/port (`LISTEN_ADDR`).

Successful JSON responses use `{ "data": ... }`. Error JSON uses `{ "error": { "message": "..." } }`. DELETE success is 204 with no body.

- **GET /api/health** — liveness (no DB).
- **GET /api/ready** — readiness (`SELECT 1` on Postgres).

request.description: Liveness probe. 200 JSON: `{ "data": { "status": "ok" } }`. Does not hit the database.
Readiness probe: runs `SELECT 1` on Postgres. 200 with `{ "data": { "status": "ready", "database": "ok" } }` when DB is up; 503 with standard error JSON if the database is unreachable.
Creates a root item when `parent_id` is null. Set `parent_id` to an existing item id to nest.
Returns 404 if the item does not exist. Change the `1` in the path to another id as needed.
204 on success. 404 if not found. 409 if the item still has children. Change the `1` in the path to another id as needed.
